title: Zero-downtime image rollout
scenario: The security team flagged nginx:1.21 — it has several CVEs. You need to roll out nginx:1.25 across all 3 replicas of the `frontend` Deployment without dropping requests. The Deployment must use a RollingUpdate strategy.
starterYaml:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: frontend
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web
        image: nginx:1.21
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80

hints.text: Change `image: nginx:1.21` to `image: nginx:1.25`. The strategy is already correct in the starter.
After applying, watch the Cluster View — old pods terminate one at a time as new ones start.

solution:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: frontend
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web
        image: nginx:1.25
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
